title: Ember Charred Korean Lemongrass Takrai Ssam
description: Charred scallop shells hold a creamy lemongrass and takrai mixture, perfect for an indulgent vegetarian ssam experience.
instructions: Preheat a grill to medium-high and prepare the scallop shells for charring.
Place the cleaned scallop shells on the grill and char them for about 2 minutes on each side until lightly blistered.
In a medium bowl whisk together coconut milk, soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, pepper, and red chili flakes until smooth and fragrant.
Add minced garlic, grated ginger, and lemongrass pieces to the bowl and stir to combine.
Stir in the takrai leaves and cook the mixture for 2 minutes, just until the leaves soften slightly.
Remove the charred shells from the grill and pour the creamy lemongrass-takrai mixture into each shell.
Garnish each shell with a few fresh lemongrass pieces for extra aroma.
Serve immediately, accompanied by lettuce leaves for wrapping as ssam.
